dateRange.label: Time range
dateRange.needBoth: Select both start and end date/time
dateRange.swapped: Start and end were swapped (start was after end)

dashboard.title: SOC Dashboard
dashboard.logWarningShort: No logs in 60s — check vuln-web & shared log volume
dashboard.logWarningBody: No log entries received in the last 60 seconds. Check that vuln-web is running and the shared log volume is mounted correctly.

incidents.title: Incidents
incidents.subtitle: {{count}} total incidents detected
incidents.ongoingHint: Resolved / false positive tickets live under All Incidents — set status back to Investigating to reopen.
incidents.empty: No incidents found — try adjusting filters
incidents.exportHint: Uses current severity, status, attack type, and search filters. Choose a date range below.
incidents.exportHintOngoing: Exports open incidents only (New + Investigating). Resolved tickets are excluded — use All Incidents page for full archive export.
incidents.exportHintAll: Exports all statuses including Resolved and False positive. Uses current filters and date range below.

blockedIps.title: Blocked IPs
blockedIps.subtitle: {{count}} active blocks
blockedIps.editHint: Temporary duration is counted from now when you save.
blockedIps.repeatOffenderTooltip: This IP has triggered ≥{{threshold}} incidents. Consider permanent block.

ipManagement.title: IP Management
ipManagement.whitelistReasonDefault: Manually whitelisted from IP Management — trusted IP
ipManagement.extendHint: TTL refreshes Redis enforcement from now. Max requests and window apply to vuln-web via rate_limited.json (per IP). Global defaults remain in Settings.
ipManagement.noTtlHint: Redis TTL is missing (worker restart or Redis unavailable). vuln-web still enforces using the JSON file and window/max settings.

rules.title: Detection Rules
rules.subtitle: {{count}} active rules
rules.labModeOn: Lab mode ON: only active UI rules are used (OWASP baseline disabled). Save Settings if you changed the toggle.
rules.baselineActive: Production mode: active UI rules plus built-in OWASP baseline patterns in detection_engine.py (toggle Lab mode in Settings for capstone demos).

chatbot.dragHint: Drag to move · Click to open

traffic.title: Live Traffic
traffic.subtitle: Real-time activity from the monitored web app · auto-refreshes every 3s
traffic.empty: No traffic yet — try visiting http://localhost:5050 (or your vuln-web URL)
traffic.tagHint: Tags are heuristic (pattern match on log lines). A row tagged Attack may still show HTTP 200 until the next request after SOC blocks the IP. Confirm enforcement under Incidents / Blocked IPs.
traffic.loadError: Failed to load traffic. Check if backend is running.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: {{count}} accounts
users.info: Approve pending self-registrations, assign roles, suspend accounts, or force a password reset.
users.manageHint: Approving a pending user requires a role to be assigned.
users.resetPasswordHint: Leave blank to auto-generate a secure password. It will be shown once below — copy it now, it cannot be retrieved later.
users.generatedPasswordLabel: Generated password (copy now — shown only once):
users.deleteConfirm: Delete user "{{username}}"? This cannot be undone. Any incidents assigned to this user will be unassigned.
users.cannotModifySelf: You cannot modify your own account here

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: Admin actions and security events
audit.info: Tracks rule changes, IP blocks, incident updates, settings changes, and logins.

incidentDetail.title: Incident #{{id}}
incidentDetail.aiHint: Generate a human-readable explanation of this threat using Groq AI.
incidentDetail.modelTooltip: Model that produced this explanation: {{model}}. If API fails, shows fallback-static. Settings → Model is tried first, then other Groq models automatically.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure external integrations and detection thresholds
settings.subtitleAnalyst: Customize your appearance, language, and alert preferences
settings.themeHint: Preference is saved locally and applied on next visit.
settings.languageHint: UI labels and IP pattern analysis follow this preference.
settings.alertSoundHint: Applies to the notification bell in the sidebar. Does not affect email or Telegram.
settings.alertSoundBlocked: Browser blocked audio — interact with the page first, then try again.
settings.auditHint: Review admin actions and security events.
settings.telegramHint: 1. Create a bot at @BotFather  2. Get your Chat ID at @userinfobot
settings.tempBlockHint: Default hours for temporary block (used by legacy actions)
settings.thresholdsHint: Saved to the database and applied on the next log analysis (within ~60s). Brute force uses failed POST /login count.
settings.escalatingHint: IP blocks escalate with each offense. No IP is permanently blocked automatically — admin decides after reviewing Repeat Offenders.
settings.repeatOffenderThresholdHint: Number of offenses before an IP is flagged as Repeat Offender
settings.escalatingHighHint: Comma-separated hours per offense tier. Default: 1, 24, 168 (1h → 24h → 7d)
settings.escalatingCriticalHint: Comma-separated hours per offense tier. Default: 24, 168, 720 (24h → 7d → 30d)
settings.labModeLabel: Use only active rules from Detection Rules (disable OWASP baseline)
settings.labModeHint: Default OFF for production-style demos. When ON, attacks are detected only if they match an active rule in the UI — useful to prove custom regex (e.g. lorem ipsum SQLi). AI assistant is unchanged.
settings.groqTestHint: This model is used for both the Chatbot and AI Incident Analysis. The selected model is tried first, then the system automatically falls back to the next model in the list if it fails. Deprecated models (llama-3.3-70b-versatile, llama-3.1-8b-instant) have been removed.

ipHistory.title: IP History
ipHistory.noIncidents: No incidents found for this IP.
ipHistory.whitelistConfirm: Marks this IP as trusted: it will not be written to blocked_ips.json, rate limits are cleared, and automatic detection will skip new incidents for this IP. Use for known admin gateways or false positives.
ipHistory.whitelistReasonDefault: Whitelisted from IP history — trusted IP
ipHistory.whitelistExplain: Trusted IP — not auto-blocked on vuln-web. Detection skipped. Reason: {{reason}}

session.tokenBody: Your session will expire in {{time}}. Sign in again to stay logged in.
session.idleBody: You have been inactive. You will be logged out in {{time}} due to inactivity. Click the button below to stay active.

login.title: Incidentra
login.subtitle: Intelligent Web SOC Platform
login.noAccountHint: Contact your SOC administrator for account access.
login.registerHint: Your account will need admin approval before you can log in.
login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.registerSuccess: Registration submitted. An administrator must approve your account before you can log in.
